title: Allow to omit trailing module ports in ordered list connection

features.name: ordered port list instantiation with omitted trailing ports having defaults
features.description: Code should include a module instantiation using an ordered port list where fewer port connections are provided than the module declares, with the omitted trailing ports having default values
features.snippet:
module def(output logic a, input logic x, input logic y = 1'b1); assign a = x ^ y; endmodule
module test(output logic a, input logic x); def inst_I(a, x); endmodule
